tasks.method: Scatter plot matrix with trend lines combining match outcome and metrics, using SQL JOIN on match_id between detailed_player_data and match_summary. Highlight players from winning teams using color encoding.
tasks.objective: Identify direct relationships between individual batting/bowling metrics and match victories

tasks.method: Parallel coordinates plot showing computed performance impact scores (D2 formula), with axes for normalized metrics and award frequency. Interactive brushing to filter top performers.
tasks.objective: Compare relative importance of different metrics in determining match-winning contributions

tasks.method: Faceted bar charts (V1) split by batter/bowler roles. Use length encoding for metrics and color for match outcome. Sort bars by fantasy_points descending.
tasks.objective: Identify players with consistently high fantasy points in winning matches

tasks.method: Geospatial heatmap (V4) layered with hexagonal binning. Geographic positions encoded via city, intensity shows avg runs/wickets for home-team winners.
tasks.objective: Reveal venue-specific performance patterns contributing to victories

tasks.method: Interactive radar chart with weight sliders (I2). Radial axes represent D2 metrics. Clusters identified via k-means based on slider-adjusted weights.
tasks.objective: Discover player archetypes with distinct match-winning contribution patterns

tasks.method: Multi-panel kernel density estimation plots. Progression from career averages to match-specific wins shown through linked selections.
tasks.objective: Analyze how batting/bowling consistency correlates with team success

tasks.method: Bubble plot with performance-impact vs awards ratio. Size encodes total matches. Anomaly detection via DBSCAN to highlight over/under-valued players.
tasks.objective: Identify players with disproportionate impact compared to formal recognition
